name: Whole Trout in Sweet & Sour Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Sweet and Sour Sauce according to the recipe.
2. Split the fish down the back and remove the backbone and entrails.
3. Sprinkle the fish with salt and pepper.
4. Spread beaten egg over the fish and sprinkle with cornstarch, then coat with flour. Pat to ensure a secure coating.
5. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy skillet to very hot (around 350°F/175°C).
6. Carefully place the coated fish into the hot oil and fry until golden brown. Remove and let cool on paper towels.
7. When ready to serve, reheat the fish in the same hot oil for a few seconds to crisp it up.
